description: Gold layer configuration for revenue gap with dimension references

gold_tables.sql_script: SELECT ch."EncounterICN" as revenueGapID, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE) * 100 + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) as yearMonth, COALESCE(dm.memberKey, ch."HICNumber") as memberKey, ch."HICNumber" as planMemberID, COALESCE(dp.providerKey, ch."BillingProviderNPI") as providerKey, ch."BillingProviderNPI" as billingProviderID, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(NULLIF(cl."ServiceLineChargeAmount", '') AS DECIMAL)), 0) as totalBilledAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(NULLIF(cl."ServiceLineUnitCount", '') AS DECIMAL)), 0) as totalUnits, COUNT(cl."ClaimLineNumber") as lineCount, ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" as primaryDiagnosis, CASE WHEN ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" LIKE 'E11%' THEN 'Diabetes' WHEN ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode" LIKE 'I25%' THEN 'Heart Disease' ELSE 'Other' END as conditionCategory, 'Pending Review' as gapStatus, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as createdDateTime FROM claim_headers ch LEFT JOIN claim_lines cl ON ch."EncounterICN" = cl."ClaimLineEncounterICN" LEFT JOIN platinum_dimmember dm ON ch."HICNumber" = dm.planMemberID AND dm.isCurrent = 1 LEFT JOIN platinum_dimprovider dp ON ch."BillingProviderNPI" = dp.npi AND dp.isCurrent = 1 WHERE ch."RecordType" = 'C' GROUP BY ch."EncounterICN", ch."HICNumber", dm.memberKey, ch."BillingProviderNPI", dp.providerKey, ch."PrincipalDiagnosisCode"
